sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INT, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '2021-06-15 12:00:00-06'), (2, TIMESTAMPTZ '2022-07-20 14:30:00-05');
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = timezone('Europe/London', event_time) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, timezone('America/New_York', event_time) AS new_york_time FROM test_timestamps;
SELECT id, timezone('Asia/Tokyo', event_time) AS tokyo_time FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time > timezone('Europe/Berlin', TIMESTAMPTZ '2021-01-01 00:00:00+00');
